title: FriendZ
description: A plugin to make friends rank eachother, message eachother and have added in mc
body:
# FriendZ - The Ultimate Social Experience for Minecraft

## Transform Your Minecraft Server with a Dynamic Friend System

FriendZ brings a robust and intuitive social layer to your Minecraft experience, enhancing player connections and community engagement. This lightweight yet powerful plugin enables players to build and manage meaningful relationships within your server.

## Key Features

### 🤝 Comprehensive Friend Management
- **Add & Remove Friends**: Simple commands to grow your social circle
- **Friend List**: View all your connections with online status indicators
- **Friendship Levels**: Rank your friends from 1-10 to show your closest allies
- **Organized Viewing**: Paginated lists for easy navigation of large friend groups

### 💬 Seamless Communication
- **Direct Messaging**: Talk privately with friends using the `/msf` command
- **Quick Reply**: Easily respond to recent messages with `/msf r`
- **Personalized Experience**: Message colors based on friendship levels

### 🔔 Friend Awareness
- **Join Notifications**: Get alerts when your friends log in
- **Status Updates**: See which friends are currently online
- **Visual Indicators**: Friendship level displayed with star ratings

### ⚙️ Highly Configurable
- **Custom Messages**: Personalize all plugin notifications
- **Sound Effects**: Optional audio cues for friend actions
- **Permission System**: Fine-grained control over feature access
- **Friend Limits**: Set maximum friend count (with permission bypass option)

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/friend add <player>` | Add someone to your friends list |
| `/friend remove <player>` | Remove someone from your friends list |
| `/friend list [page]` | View your friends with status and levels |
| `/friend rank <player> <1-10>` | Set your friendship level with someone |
| `/msf <player> <message>` | Send a private message to a friend |
| `/msf r <message>` | Reply to the last received message |
| `/friendz reload` | Reload plugin configuration (admin) |

## Why Choose FriendZ?

FriendZ stands out from other social plugins by focusing on meaningful connections rather than just basic friend lists. The friendship ranking system creates a unique dynamic where players can visually represent their closest allies, adding depth to server relationships.

The plugin is designed with performance in mind - minimal resource usage ensures your server runs smoothly even with hundreds of players maintaining friend networks. All data is efficiently stored and optimized for quick access.

Server owners will appreciate the seamless integration with existing permission systems and the highly customizable configuration that allows the plugin to match your server's unique aesthetic and ruleset.

## Perfect For:

- **Survival Servers**: Coordinate with allies across vast worlds
- **Roleplay Communities**: Build in-character relationships
- **Minigame Networks**: Easily team up with friends across games
- **Any Server**: Enhance player retention through social connections

FriendZ is more than just a friends list - it's a complete social framework that will keep your players connected and engaged for longer periods, building stronger communities on your server.

---

*Compatible with Spigot, Paper, and bukkit server implementations. Requires Minecraft 1.20 or newer.*
